---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or module for VirtuaStudio
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
One-line description of the feature.

## Motivation
Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the implementation approach.

### If new module:
- Module ID:
- Type: PLAYGROUND / PRODUCTION
- Tags:
- Key Three.js features used:

### If core change:
- Files affected:
- Interface changes: yes / no

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] npx tsc --noEmit passes
- [ ] npm run test passes

## Alternatives Considered
Other approaches you considered and why you rejected them.
